#wrap{position:relative;width:100%;font-family:var(--font-sans)}

#tt strong{display:block;font-weight:500;color:var(--color-text-primary);margin-bottom:2px}

.dp{stroke:#fff;stroke-width:0.4;cursor:pointer;transition:opacity .12s}

.idp{cursor:pointer;transition:opacity .12s}
.idp:hover{opacity:.75}
.ibub{cursor:pointer;transition:opacity .12s}
.ibub:hover{opacity:.85}
</style>

ltiPolygon","coordinates":[[[[14.4491,50.0831],[14.4457,50.079],[14.4471,50.0769],[14.445,50.0755],[14.4321,50.0757],[14.4249,50.0729],[14.4206,50.0768],[14.4109,50.0769],[14.3986,50.0817],[14.4008,50.0837],[14.4024,50.0885],[14.4226,50.0918],[14.428,50.0897],[14.4479,50.0906],[14.4499,50.0881],[14.4491,50.0831]]],[[[14.5161,50.0435],[14.4539,50.063],[14.5456,50.0881],[14.55,50.0701],[14.5161,50.0435]]],[[[14.5066,50.0413],[14.5898,50.0317],[14.5874,50.008],[14.5171,49.9921],[14.5106,50.0189],[14.4817,50.0319],[14.5066,50.0413]]],[[[14.4136,49.9639],[14.409,50.0169],[14.4538,50.0199],[14.4997,49.99],[14.4136,49.9639]]],[[[14.3375,50.0065],[14.345,49.9868],[14.3246,49.9918],[14.3175,50.0176],[14.2764,50.0435],[14.3353,50.0623],[14.3683,50.0489],[14.3375,50.0065]]],[[[14.553,50.0789],[14.5422,50.1101],[14.5613,50.1185],[14.634,50.0942],[14.553,50.0789]]],[[[14.5161,50.0435],[14.553,50.0789],[14.6311,50.0602],[14.5611,50.0257],[14.5161,50.0435]]],[[[14.409,50.0169],[14.4035,49.9522],[14.3484,49.9473],[14.354,49.9802],[14.3318,50.0017],[14.409,50.0169]]],[[[14.3353,50.0623],[14.2764,50.0435],[14.2629,50.0556],[14.306,50.0739],[14.3353,50.0623]]],[[[14.5162,50.1413],[14.549,50.1281],[14.5135,50.1239],[14.5162,50.1413]]],[[[14.592,50.1137],[14.5398,50.1149],[14.5472,50.1367],[14.5123,50.1451],[14.5202,50.1681],[14.5938,50.1462],[14.62,50.1254],[14.592,50.1137]]],[[[14.4249,50.0729],[14.4629,50.0718],[14.4301,50.058],[14.4249,50.0729]]],[[[14.6336,50.094],[14.5874,50.1066],[14.6595,50.1214],[14.6614,50.095],[14.6336,50.094]]],[[[14.599,50.0796],[14.6717,50.1072],[14.7185,50.0789],[14.643,50.0524],[14.599,50.0796]]],[[[14.5874,50.008],[14.581,50.0382],[14.6057,50.0524],[14.6311,50.0602],[14.6686,50.0387],[14.6434,49.9972],[14.5874,50.008]]],[[[14.5135,50.0869],[14.4885,50.0724],[14.4511,50.0829],[14.5135,50.0869]]],[[[14.4539,50.063],[14.5079,50.0473],[14.4817,50.0319],[14.5106,50.0189],[14.5171,49.9921],[14.4989,49.9868],[14.4538,50.0199],[14.409,50.0169],[14.4301,50.058],[14.4539,50.063]]],[[[14.4109,50.0769],[14.4301,50.058],[14.4141,50.0285],[14.3773,50.0053],[14.3375,50.0065],[14.3688,50.0483],[14.3367,50.069],[14.4109,50.0769]]],[[[14.4226,50.0918],[14.4006,50.0737],[14.2948,50.0703],[14.2509,50.1002],[14.4031,50.1408],[14.4226,50.0918]]],[[[14.4479,50.0906],[14.4226,50.0918],[14.4157,50.1259],[14.4739,50.1025],[14.4479,50.0906]]],[[[14.4491,50.0831],[14.4739,50.1025],[14.4125,50.14],[14.5202,50.1681],[14.4894,50.1156],[14.5043,50.1083],[14.4491,50.0831]]],[[[14.5456,50.0881],[14.489,50.0937],[14.5044,50.1085],[14.4894,50.1156],[14.5365,50.1231],[14.5456,50.0881]]]]}}]};

const W=1000, H=680, LEGW=195;
const mapW = W - LEGW - 10;

const projection = d3.geoMercator().fitSize([mapW, H-130], geojson);
const path = d3.geoPath(projection);

const eduVals = Object.values(migData).map(d=>d.edu);
const eduMin = Math.min(...eduVals), eduMax = Math.max(...eduVals);
const eduColor = d3.scaleSequential().domain([eduMin,eduMax])
  .interpolator(isDark ? d3.interpolateRgb("#1a3a5c","#7bc8f0") : d3.interpolateRgb("#deeef8","#0C447C"));
const migMax = Math.max(...Object.values(migData).map(d=>Math.abs(d.mig)));
const rScale = d3.scaleSqrt().domain([0,migMax]).range([2,18]);

const svg = d3.select("#map").append("svg")
  .attr("viewBox",`0 0 ${W} ${H}`)
  .attr("width","100%").style("display","block");

const mapG = svg.append("g").attr("transform","translate(0,10)");

function showTT(event, html) {
  const tt = document.getElementById("tt");
  tt.style.display = "block";
  tt.innerHTML = html;
}
function moveTT(event) {
  const wrap = document.getElementById("wrap");
  const rect = wrap.getBoundingClientRect();
  const tt = document.getElementById("tt");
  tt.style.left = (event.clientX - rect.left + 14) + "px";
  tt.style.top  = (event.clientY - rect.top  - 10) + "px";
}
function hideTT() { document.getElementById("tt").style.display = "none"; }

geojson.features.forEach(f => {
  const key = f.properties.NAME_2;
  const d = migData[key];
  const fill = d ? eduColor(d.edu) : (isDark ? "#2a2a28" : "#e8e7e2");
  const disp = displayNames[key] || key;
  mapG.append("path").datum(f).attr("class","dp").attr("d",path).attr("fill",fill)
    .on("mouseover", e => {
      showTT(e, d
        ? `<strong>${disp}</strong><span>${d.mig>=0?"In-migration":"Out-migration"}: ${d.mig>=0?"+":""}${d.mig.toFixed(1)} / 1 000</span><br><span>Tertiary edu: ${d.edu.toFixed(1)}%</span>`
        : `<strong>${disp}</strong><span>No data</span>`);
    })
    .on("mousemove", moveTT).on("mouseout", hideTT);
});

geojson.features.forEach(f => {
  const key = f.properties.NAME_2;
  const d = migData[key];
  if (!d) return;
  const c = path.centroid(f);
  if (!c || isNaN(c[0])) return;
  const r = rScale(Math.abs(d.mig));
  const disp = displayNames[key] || key;

  mapG.append("circle").attr("class","bub")
    .attr("cx",c[0]).attr("cy",c[1]).attr("r",r)
    .attr("fill", d.mig>=0?"#2471A3":"#C0392B")
    .attr("fill-opacity",0.78)
    .attr("stroke", d.mig>=0?"#154360":"#7B241C")
    .attr("stroke-width",0.6)
    .on("mouseover", e => {
      showTT(e, `<strong>${disp}</strong><span>${d.mig>=0?"In-migration":"Out-migration"}: ${d.mig>=0?"+":""}${d.mig.toFixed(1)} / 1 000</span><br><span>Tertiary edu: ${d.edu.toFixed(1)}%</span>`);
    })
    .on("mousemove", moveTT).on("mouseout", hideTT);

  mapG.append("text")
    .attr("x",c[0]).attr("y",c[1]-r-2)
    .attr("text-anchor","middle").attr("font-size",6.5)
    .attr("font-family","var(--font-sans)")
    .attr("fill", isDark?"rgba(210,208,196,0.9)":"rgba(20,20,18,0.85)")
    .attr("paint-order","stroke")
    .attr("stroke", isDark?"rgba(15,15,13,0.75)":"rgba(255,255,255,0.85)")
    .attr("stroke-width",2.2).attr("stroke-linejoin","round")
    .attr("pointer-events","none").text(disp);
});

const prahaGeojsonFeatures = geojson.features.filter(f =>
  ["Praha","Praha-západ","Praha-východ","Kladno","Mělník","MladáBoleslav","Nymburk","Kolín","Benešov","Příbram","Beroun","Rakovník"].includes(f.properties.NAME_2)
);

const INSET_X=10, INSET_Y=H-235, INSET_W=315, INSET_H=220;

svg.append("rect")
  .attr("x",INSET_X).attr("y",INSET_Y)
  .attr("width",INSET_W).attr("height",INSET_H)
  .attr("fill", isDark?"rgba(20,20,18,0.97)":"rgba(252,251,248,0.97)")
  .attr("stroke", isDark?"rgba(255,255,255,0.18)":"rgba(0,0,0,0.25)")
  .attr("stroke-width",1).attr("rx",5);

svg.append("text").attr("x",INSET_X+8).attr("y",INSET_Y+14)
  .attr("font-size",9.5).attr("font-weight",500).attr("font-family","var(--font-sans)")
  .attr("fill", isDark?"#c2c0b6":"#2c2c2a")
  .text("Prague suburban region — migration & education");
svg.append("text").attr("x",INSET_X+8).attr("y",INSET_Y+25)
  .attr("font-size",8).attr("font-family","var(--font-sans)")
  .attr("fill", isDark?"#888780":"#73726c")
  .text("Okresy within ~60 km · same symbol encoding");

const insetProj = d3.geoMercator()
  .fitExtent([[INSET_X+12, INSET_Y+32],[INSET_X+INSET_W-12, INSET_Y+INSET_H-22]],
    {type:"FeatureCollection", features: prahaGeojsonFeatures});
const insetPath = d3.geoPath(insetProj);
const insetG = svg.append("g");

prahaGeojsonFeatures.forEach(f => {
  const key = f.properties.NAME_2;
  const d = migData[key];
  const fill = d ? eduColor(d.edu) : (isDark?"#2a2a28":"#e8e7e2");
  const disp = displayNames[key] || key;
  insetG.append("path").datum(f)
    .attr("class","idp").attr("d",insetPath).attr("fill",fill)
    .attr("stroke","#fff").attr("stroke-width",0.5)
    .on("mouseover", e => {
      showTT(e, d
        ? `<strong>${disp}</strong><span>${d.mig>=0?"In-migration":"Out-migration"}: ${d.mig>=0?"+":""}${d.mig.toFixed(1)} / 1 000</span><br><span>Tertiary edu: ${d.edu.toFixed(1)}%</span>`
        : `<strong>${disp}</strong><span>No data</span>`);
    })
    .on("mousemove", moveTT).on("mouseout", hideTT);
});

prahaGeojsonFeatures.forEach(f => {
  const key = f.properties.NAME_2;
  const d = migData[key];
  if (!d) return;
  const c = insetPath.centroid(f);
  if (!c || isNaN(c[0])) return;
  const r = Math.max(3, rScale(Math.abs(d.mig)) * 0.72);
  const disp = displayNames[key] || key;
  insetG.append("circle").attr("class","ibub")
    .attr("cx",c[0]).attr("cy",c[1]).attr("r",r)
    .attr("fill", d.mig>=0?"#2471A3":"#C0392B")
    .attr("fill-opacity",0.82)
    .attr("stroke", d.mig>=0?"#154360":"#7B241C")
    .attr("stroke-width",0.7)
    .on("mouseover", e => {
      showTT(e, `<strong>${disp}</strong><span>${d.mig>=0?"In-migration":"Out-migration"}: ${d.mig>=0?"+":""}${d.mig.toFixed(1)} / 1 000</span><br><span>Tertiary edu: ${d.edu.toFixed(1)}%</span>`);
    })
    .on("mousemove", moveTT).on("mouseout", hideTT);
  insetG.append("text")
    .attr("x",c[0]).attr("y",c[1]-r-2)
    .attr("text-anchor","middle").attr("font-size",7.5)
    .attr("font-family","var(--font-sans)")
    .attr("fill", isDark?"rgba(210,208,196,0.95)":"rgba(20,20,18,0.9)")
    .attr("paint-order","stroke")
    .attr("stroke", isDark?"rgba(15,15,13,0.8)":"rgba(255,255,255,0.9)")
    .attr("stroke-width",2).attr("stroke-linejoin","round")
    .attr("pointer-events","none").text(disp);
});

const prC = insetPath.centroid(prahaGeojsonFeatures.find(f=>f.properties.NAME_2==="Praha"));
if (prC && !isNaN(prC[0])) {
  insetG.append("circle").attr("cx",prC[0]).attr("cy",prC[1]).attr("r",22)
    .attr("fill","none").attr("stroke","#E67E22").attr("stroke-width",1.4)
    .attr("stroke-dasharray","4 3").attr("pointer-events","none");
  insetG.append("text").attr("x",prC[0]).attr("y",INSET_Y+INSET_H-8)
    .attr("text-anchor","middle").attr("font-size",7.5)
    .attr("font-family","var(--font-sans)").attr("fill","#E67E22").attr("pointer-events","none")
    .text("dashed ring = Praha core · centrifugal suburbanization outward");
}

const mainPrahaPt = projection([14.438, 50.075]);
if (mainPrahaPt) {
  svg.append("line")
    .attr("x1", mainPrahaPt[0]).attr("y1", mainPrahaPt[1]+10)
    .attr("x2", INSET_X + INSET_W * 0.42).attr("y2", INSET_Y)
    .attr("stroke", isDark?"rgba(230,126,34,0.6)":"rgba(180,80,0,0.5)")
    .attr("stroke-width",1).attr("stroke-dasharray","4,3")
    .attr("pointer-events","none");
}

const lx = mapW+14, ly = 12;
const legG = svg.append("g");
const lbl=(txt,y,bold,sz)=>legG.append("text")
  .attr("x",lx).attr("y",y).attr("font-size",sz||10).attr("font-weight",bold?500:400)
  .attr("font-family","var(--font-sans)").attr("fill",isDark?"#c2c0b6":"#2c2c2a").text(txt);

lbl("Net migration / 1 000",ly+8,true,10.5);
lbl("Proportional circles",ly+20,false,9);
let by=ly+42;
legG.append("text").attr("x",lx).attr("y",by-2)
  .attr("font-size",9).attr("font-weight",500).attr("font-family","var(--font-sans)")
  .attr("fill","#2471A3").text("In-migration (blue)");
[[2,1],[8,5],[16,18]].forEach(([s,v])=>{
  legG.append("circle").attr("cx",lx+9).attr("cy",by+s+4).attr("r",s)
    .attr("fill","#2471A3").attr("fill-opacity",.78).attr("stroke","#154360").attr("stroke-width",.6);
  legG.append("text").attr("x",lx+22).attr("y",by+s+8)
    .attr("font-size",9).attr("font-family","var(--font-sans)")
    .attr("fill",isDark?"#888780":"#5f5e5a").text(`+${v}`);
  by+=s*2+8;
});
by+=8;
legG.append("text").attr("x",lx).attr("y",by-2)
  .attr("font-size",9).attr("font-weight",500).attr("font-family","var(--font-sans)")
  .attr("fill","#C0392B").text("Out-migration (red)");
[[2,1],[8,5],[16,18]].forEach(([s,v])=>{
  legG.append("circle").attr("cx",lx+9).attr("cy",by+s+4).attr("r",s)
    .attr("fill","#C0392B").attr("fill-opacity",.78).attr("stroke","#7B241C").attr("stroke-width",.6);
  legG.append("text").attr("x",lx+22).attr("y",by+s+8)
    .attr("font-size",9).attr("font-family","var(--font-sans)")
    .attr("fill",isDark?"#888780":"#5f5e5a").text(`−${v}`);
  by+=s*2+8;
});
by+=14;
lbl("Tertiary education",by,true,10.5); by+=13;
lbl("% pop. 25–64",by,false,9); by+=14;
const nS=7,sW=25;
for(let i=0;i<=nS;i++){
  const v=eduMin+(i/nS)*(eduMax-eduMin);
  legG.append("rect").attr("x",lx+i*sW).attr("y",by).attr("width",sW).attr("height",14).attr("fill",eduColor(v));
}
legG.append("text").attr("x",lx).attr("y",by+26)
  .attr("font-size",8.5).attr("font-family","var(--font-sans)").attr("fill",isDark?"#888780":"#73726c").text(`${eduMin.toFixed(0)}%`);
legG.append("text").attr("x",lx+nS*sW).attr("y",by+26)
  .attr("text-anchor","end").attr("font-size",8.5).attr("font-family","var(--font-sans)").attr("fill",isDark?"#888780":"#73726c").text(`${eduMax.toFixed(0)}%`);
by+=40;
lbl("Prague inset",by,true,9.5); by+=12;
["Praha core: highest edu","+ in-migration nationally","Peri-urban ring absorbs","suburbanising households","Praha-Z: +22.1 peak rate"].forEach(s=>{
  legG.append("text").attr("x",lx).attr("y",by)
    .attr("font-size",8.5).attr("font-family","var(--font-sans)").attr("fill",isDark?"#888780":"#5f5e5a").text(s);
  by+=11;
});
by+=10;
lbl("Sources",by,true,9.5); by+=12;
["ČSÚ · vdb.czso.cz","data.csu.gov.cz (OBY06E)","scitani.gov.cz/education","Polygons: GADM v4.1 CZE L2"].forEach(s=>{
  legG.append("text").attr("x",lx).attr("y",by)
    .attr("font-size",8).attr("font-family","var(--font-sans)").attr("fill",isDark?"#5f5e5a":"#888780").text(s);
  by+=11;
});

svg.append("text").attr("x",mapW/2).attr("y",H-18)
  .attr("text-anchor","middle").attr("font-size",8.5)
